# 📜 占星歷史 | History of Astrology

> **占星術是人類最古老的知識體系之一，跨越五千年文明，連結天上與地下。**
>
> *Astrology is one of humanity's oldest knowledge systems, spanning five millennia of civilization, connecting the heavens and the earth.*

---

## 一、占星術起源（公元前 3000 年 - 公元前 500 年）
## I. Origins of Astrology (3000 BCE - 500 BCE)

<details>
<summary><strong>🌍 美索不達米亞文明 | Mesopotamian Civilization</strong></summary>

### 蘇美爾時期（公元前 3500-2000 年）
### Sumerian Period (3500-2000 BCE)

- **最早的天文記錄**：蘇美爾人在泥板上記錄行星運動、日月食
- **最早的神廟觀測台**：Ziggurat（塔廟）用於天文觀測
- **60 進位制**：奠定角度測量基礎（360° 圓周）

*Earliest astronomical records: Sumerians recorded planetary movements and eclipses on clay tablets. Temple observatories (Ziggurats) used for celestial observation. Sexagesimal system established angular measurement (360° circle).*

### 巴比倫占星（公元前 1800-500 年）
### Babylonian Astrology (1800-500 BCE)

- **黃道十二宮起源**：將黃道帶分為 12 個星座，每宮 30°
- **MUL.APIN 泥板**（公元前 1000 年）：現存最完整的巴比倫天文文獻
- **行星神祇系統**：木星=馬爾杜克、金星=伊什塔爾等
- **預兆占星**：天象預示國家命運、戰爭、豐收

*Zodiac origins: Divided ecliptic into 12 signs, 30° each. MUL.APIN tablets (1000 BCE): most complete Babylonian astronomical text. Planetary deity system. Omen astrology: celestial phenomena predicted national fate, warfare, harvest.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🏺 古埃及占星 | Ancient Egyptian Astrology</strong></summary>

### 天狼星與尼羅河
### Sirius and the Nile

- **Sothic 週期**：天狼星偕日升預示尼羅河泛濫（每年 7 月）
- **365 天曆法**：基於天狼星觀測的精確曆法
- **Decans 系統**：36 個十度區間，用於夜間計時

*Sothic cycle: Heliacal rising of Sirius predicted Nile flooding (July). 365-day calendar based on Sirius observation. Decans system: 36 ten-degree sectors for nighttime timekeeping.*

### 黃道帶與神祇
### Zodiac and Deities

- **Dendera 黃道帶**（公元前 50 年）：現存最完整的埃及黃道帶浮雕
- **行星神祇**：太陽=拉、月亮=托特、木星=阿蒙
- **赫密斯主義**：傳說中的赫密斯·特里斯墨吉斯忒斯著作

*Dendera Zodiac (50 BCE): most complete Egyptian zodiac relief. Planetary deities: Sun=Ra, Moon=Thoth, Jupiter=Amun. Hermeticism: legendary writings of Hermes Trismegistus.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🐉 古代中國占星 | Ancient Chinese Astrology</strong></summary>

### 早期天文觀測
### Early Astronomical Observation

- **甲骨文記錄**（公元前 1200 年）：日食、月食、彗星、超新星
- **二十八宿體系**：將天球赤道分為 28 個區域
- **五行學說**：金、木、水、火、土與行星對應
- **陰陽理論**：宇宙二元對立統一

*Oracle bone records (1200 BCE): eclipses, comets, supernovae. 28 Mansions system: divided celestial equator into 28 sectors. Five Elements theory: metal, wood, water, fire, earth corresponding to planets. Yin-Yang theory: cosmic duality.*

### 占星機構
### Astrological Institutions

- **欽天監**：皇家天文占星機構（漢代設立）
- **史記·天官書**（公元前 100 年）：司馬遷編纂的系統占星著作

*Imperial Astronomical Bureau (established Han Dynasty). Records of the Grand Historian: Treatise on the Celestial Offices (100 BCE): systematic astrological text by Sima Qian.*

</details>

---

## 二、古典占星黃金時期（公元前 500 年 - 公元 500 年）
## II. Golden Age of Classical Astrology (500 BCE - 500 CE)

<details>
<summary><strong>🏛️ 希臘化占星 | Hellenistic Astrology</strong></summary>

### 知識融合
### Knowledge Fusion

- **亞歷山大東征**（公元前 334-323 年）：希臘與巴比倫、埃及知識融合
- **亞歷山大圖書館**：古代世界最大知識中心
- **希臘占星體系形成**：結合巴比倫黃道、埃及 Decans、希臘哲學

*Alexander's conquests (334-323 BCE): fusion of Greek, Babylonian, and Egyptian knowledge. Library of Alexandria: largest knowledge center of ancient world. Hellenistic astrology formed: combining Babylonian zodiac, Egyptian Decans, Greek philosophy.*

### 核心文獻
### Core Texts

| 著作 Work | 作者 Author | 時期 Period | 貢獻 Contribution |
|---|---|---|---|
| 《四書》Tetrabiblos | 托勒密 Ptolemy | 公元 150 年 / 150 CE | 系統化占星理論 / Systematic astrological theory |
| 《選集》Anthology | 瓦倫斯 Vettius Valens | 公元 170 年 / 170 CE | 實占案例集 / Collection of practical charts |
| 《數學論》Mathesis | Firmicus Maternus | 公元 330 年 / 330 CE | 拉丁文占星大全 / Comprehensive Latin astrology |

### 希臘化技術
### Hellenistic Techniques

- **Lots（阿拉伯點前身）**：計算敏感點位
- **Profections（年運推進）**：每年推進一個宮位
- **Zodiacal Releasing（黃道釋放）**：時間主星系統
- **Egyptian Bounds（埃及界）**：行星守護區間

*Lots (precursor to Arabic Parts): calculated sensitive points. Profections: annual progression by one house. Zodiacal Releasing: time-lord system. Egyptian Bounds: planetary rulership sectors.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🕉️ 印度占星（Jyotish）| Vedic Astrology</strong></summary>

### 吠陀時期
### Vedic Period

- **起源**：公元前 1500-500 年，吠陀經典中的天文知識
- **Nakshatra 系統**：27 個月宿，每宿 13°20'
- **Vimshottari Dasha**：120 年大運週期

*Origins: 1500-500 BCE, astronomical knowledge in Vedic texts. Nakshatra system: 27 lunar mansions, 13°20' each. Vimshottari Dasha: 120-year major period cycle.*

### 希臘影響
### Greek Influence

- **Yavanajātaka**（公元 269 年）：希臘占星翻譯為梵文
- **Parashara 體系**：《Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra》奠定基礎
- **Jaimini 體系**：《Jaimini Sutras》獨立發展

*Yavanajātaka (269 CE): Greek astrology translated to Sanskrit. Parashara system: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra established foundations. Jaimini system: Jaimini Sutras developed independently.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🏛️ 羅馬帝國時期 | Roman Empire Period</strong></summary>

### 占星在羅馬
### Astrology in Rome

- **帝國顧問**：皇帝聘請占星師作為顧問
- **拉丁文獻**：Manilius《Astronomica》、Firmicus Maternus《Mathesis》
- **占星與政治**：皇位繼承、戰爭決策的占星諮詢

*Imperial advisors: emperors employed astrologers as consultants. Latin texts: Manilius' Astronomica, Firmicus Maternus' Mathesis. Astrology and politics: consultations for succession and warfare decisions.*

</details>

---

## 三、中世紀占星（公元 500 年 - 1500 年）
## III. Medieval Astrology (500 - 1500 CE)

<details>
<summary><strong>☪ 伊斯蘭黃金時代 | Islamic Golden Age</strong></summary>

### 翻譯運動
### Translation Movement

- **巴格達智慧之家**（Bayt al-Hikma, 830 年）：翻譯希臘、波斯、印度文獻
- **阿拉伯學者**：保存並發展古典占星知識
- **傳入歐洲**：12 世紀托萊多翻譯院將阿拉伯文獻譯為拉丁文

*House of Wisdom, Baghdad (830 CE): translated Greek, Persian, Indian texts. Arab scholars: preserved and developed classical astrological knowledge. Transmission to Europe: 12th century Toledo School translated Arabic texts to Latin.*

### 重要占星家
### Important Astrologers

| 占星家 Astrologer | 時期 Period | 貢獻 Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| Masha'allah | 740–815 | 擇時占星、世界年 / Electional astrology, World Years |
| Al-Kindi | 801–873 | 占星數學、影像魔法 / Astrological mathematics, talismanic magic |
| Albumasar | 787–886 | 《占星學入門》影響歐洲千年 / Introduction to Astrology influenced Europe for a millennium |
| Al-Biruni | 973–1048 | 比較占星學、印度研究 / Comparative astrology, Indian studies |

### Picatrix《賢者之目標》
### Picatrix (Ghayat al-Hakim)

- **成書**：公元 1000 年左右，西班牙
- **內容**：星體魔法、護符製作、儀式占星
- **影響**：文藝復興魔法傳統核心文獻

*Composed: circa 1000 CE, Spain. Content: stellar magic, talisman creation, ritual astrology. Influence: core text of Renaissance magical tradition.*

### 也門 Rasulid 傳統
### Yemeni Rasulid Tradition

- **Rasulid Hexaglot**（13 世紀）：六語占星手稿
- **28 月宿護符**：基於阿拉伯月宿系統的魔法實踐
- **Firdaria 週期**：行星大運系統

*Rasulid Hexaglot (13th century): six-language astrological manuscript. 28 Lunar Mansion talismans: magical practice based on Arabic mansion system. Firdaria periods: planetary major cycle system.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>⛪ 中世紀歐洲 | Medieval Europe</strong></summary>

### 修道院保存
### Monastic Preservation

- **抄寫文獻**：修道院修士抄寫拉丁文占星手稿
- **占星與醫學**：醫療占星（Iatromathematics）興起
- **大學教學**：巴黎、牛津、博洛尼亞大學教授占星

*Manuscript copying: monks copied Latin astrological manuscripts. Astrology and medicine: rise of Iatromathematics. University teaching: astrology taught at Paris, Oxford, Bologna.*

### 12 世紀翻譯運動
### 12th Century Translation Movement

- **托萊多翻譯院**：阿拉伯文→拉丁文
- **關鍵譯者**：Gerard of Cremona、Plato of Tivoli
- **譯作**：托勒密《四書》、Almagest、占星論著

*Toledo School of Translators: Arabic to Latin. Key translators: Gerard of Cremona, Plato of Tivoli. Translations: Ptolemy's Tetrabiblos, Almagest, astrological treatises.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🏮 唐宋中國占星 | Tang-Song Chinese Astrology</strong></summary>

### 七政四餘體系
### Seven Governors and Four Extras System

- **成熟時期**：唐代（618-907 年）
- **七政**：日、月、水、金、火、木、土
- **四餘**：羅睺、計都、月孛、紫氣（虛星）
- **二十八宿**：與印度 Nakshatra 平行發展

*Mature period: Tang Dynasty (618-907). Seven Governors: Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn. Four Extras: Rahu, Ketu, Yuebei, Ziqi (virtual stars). 28 Mansions: parallel development with Indian Nakshatras.*

### 張果星宗
### Zhang Guo Xing Zong

- **傳說作者**：張果老（八仙之一）
- **內容**：星入宮位解讀、格局判斷
- **影響**：後世七政四餘核心參考

*Legendary author: Zhang Guolao (one of Eight Immortals). Content: planetary position interpretations, pattern analysis. Influence: core reference for later Seven Governors astrology.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🏔️ 藏傳占星 | Tibetan Astrology</strong></summary>

### 時輪金剛體系
### Kalachakra System

- **傳入**：公元 1027 年，時輪金剛密續從印度傳入西藏
- **藏曆**：結合印度、中國、波斯元素
- **Mewa 九宮**：九宮飛星系統
- **Parkha 八卦**：源自中國八卦

*Introduction: 1027 CE, Kalachakra Tantra from India to Tibet. Tibetan calendar: combining Indian, Chinese, Persian elements. Mewa nine palaces: nine palace flying star system. Parkha eight trigrams: derived from Chinese Bagua.*

### 五力系統
### Five Powers System

- **生命力、身體力、運勢力、靈魂力、業力**
- **用於**：健康、運勢、擇日判斷

*Life force, body force, fortune force, soul force, karma force. Used for: health, fortune, date selection.*

</details>

---

## 四、文藝復興至近代（1500 年 - 1900 年）
## IV. Renaissance to Modern Era (1500 - 1900 CE)

<details>
<summary><strong>🎨 文藝復興占星 | Renaissance Astrology</strong></summary>

### 印刷術與知識傳播
### Printing Press and Knowledge Dissemination

- **古騰堡印刷術**（1440 年）：占星書籍大量出版
- **星曆表出版**：Regiomontanus、Stadius 等
- **占星年鑑**：年度預測暢銷書

*Gutenberg printing press (1440): mass publication of astrological books. Ephemeris publication: Regiomontanus, Stadius, etc. Astrological almanacs: bestselling annual predictions.*

### 天文學家兼占星師
### Astronomer-Astrologers

| 人物 Figure | 時期 Period | 貢獻 Contribution |
|---|---|---|
| 第谷·布拉赫 Tycho Brahe | 1546–1601 | 精密天文觀測，為開普勒奠定基礎 / Precise astronomical observations, foundation for Kepler |
| 約翰內斯·開普勒 Johannes Kepler | 1571–1630 | 行星運動定律，占星理論著作 / Planetary motion laws, astrological theoretical works |
| William Lilly | 1602–1681 | 《基督教占星學》英國傳統奠基 / Christian Astrology, foundation of English tradition |

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🀄 中國明清占星 | Ming-Qing Chinese Astrology</strong></summary>

### 紫微斗數
### Zi Wei Dou Shu

- **形成**：明代（1368-1644 年）
- **傳說創立者**：陳希夷（五代宋初）
- **十四主星**：紫微、天機、太陽等
- **十二宮位**：命宮、夫妻宮、財帛宮等
- **五行局**：水二局、木三局、金四局、土五局、火六局

*Formation: Ming Dynasty (1368-1644). Legendary founder: Chen Xiyi (Five Dynasties-Early Song). 14 Major Stars: Zi Wei, Tian Ji, Tai Yang, etc. 12 Palaces: Life, Spouse, Wealth, etc. Five Element Groups.*

### 三式發展
### Three Great Divinations

- **奇門遁甲**：軍事、擇日、風水
- **大六壬**：日常占測
- **太乙神數**：國運、天災預測

*Qi Men Dun Jia: military, date selection, feng shui. Da Liu Ren: daily divination. Tai Yi Shen Shu: national fortune, disaster prediction.*

### 萬化仙禽
### Wan Hua Xian Qin

- **核心**：二十八宿禽星系統
- **應用**：吞啗合戰、貴賤格局判斷
- **特色**：動物象徵與星宿對應

*Core: 28 Mansions bird-star system. Application: swallowing/battling analysis, nobility pattern judgment. Feature: animal symbolism corresponding to mansions.*

### 達摩一掌經
### Damo One Palm Scripture

- **傳說**：達摩祖師傳入
- **方法**：以手掌十二宮推算
- **六道輪迴**：前世今生分析

*Legend: transmitted by Bodhidharma. Method: palm-based twelve palace calculation. Six Realms of Reincarnation: past and life analysis.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>💡 啟蒙運動與占星衰落 | Enlightenment and Decline of Astrology</strong></summary>

### 科學革命衝擊
### Impact of Scientific Revolution

- **哥白尼日心說**（1543 年）：挑戰占星宇宙觀
- **伽利略望遠鏡**（1609 年）：新天體發現
- **牛頓力學**（1687 年）：機械宇宙觀確立

*Copernican heliocentrism (1543): challenged astrological cosmology. Galileo's telescope (1609): discovery of new celestial bodies. Newtonian mechanics (1687): established mechanical universe view.*

### 占星與天文學分離
### Separation of Astrology and Astronomy

- **18 世紀**：天文學成為獨立科學
- **大學課程**：占星學被移除
- **19 世紀低潮**：占星被視為迷信

*18th century: astronomy became independent science. University curricula: astrology removed. 19th century low point: astrology regarded as superstition.*

</details>

---

## 五、現代占星復興（1900 年 - 至今）
## V. Modern Astrology Revival (1900 CE - Present)

<details>
<summary><strong>🌍 西方占星復興 | Western Astrology Revival</strong></summary>

### 神智學會推動
### Theosophical Society Promotion

- **海倫娜·布拉瓦茨基**（1831-1891）：神智學創始人
- **艾倫·利奧**（1860-1917）：現代占星學之父
- **占星期刊**：《Modern Astrologer》等出版

*Helena Blavatsky (1831-1891): Theosophical Society founder. Alan Leo (1860-1917): father of modern astrology. Astrological journals: Modern Astrologer, etc.*

### 心理占星學
### Psychological Astrology

- **卡爾·榮格**（1875-1961）：原型、共時性理論
- **Liz Greene**（1946-）：榮格派占星心理學
- **應用**：自我認識、心理治療輔助

*Carl Jung (1875-1961): archetypes, synchronicity theory. Liz Greene (1946-): Jungian astrological psychology. Application: self-knowledge, psychotherapy aid.*

### 天王星漢堡學派
### Uranian Astrology (Hamburg School)

- **創立**：Alfred Witte（1878-1943）
- **8 顆超海王星虛點**：Cupido、Hades、Zeus 等
- **90° 度盤**：特殊投影系統
- **中點理論**：行星中點敏感點

*Founded: Alfred Witte (1878-1943). 8 trans-Neptunian virtual points: Cupido, Hades, Zeus, etc. 90° dial: special projection system. Midpoint theory: planetary midpoint sensitive points.*

### Astrocartography 地點占星
### Astrocartography

- **創立**：Jim Lewis（1941-1995）
- **原理**：將本命行星線投影到世界地圖
- **應用**：搬遷、旅行地點選擇

*Founded: Jim Lewis (1941-1995). Principle: project natal planetary lines onto world map. Application: relocation, travel destination selection.*

### Sabian Symbols
### Sabian Symbols

- **起源**：1925 年，Elsie Wheeler 通靈
- **記錄**：Marc Edmund Jones《The Sabian Symbols in Astrology》（1953）
- **內容**：360 個黃道度數的象徵圖像
- **應用**：深度心理占星解讀

*Origins: 1925, Elsie Wheeler channeling. Recorded: Marc Edmund Jones' The Sabian Symbols in Astrology (1953). Content: 360 symbolic images for zodiac degrees. Application: deep psychological astrological interpretation.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🕉️ 印度占星現代化 | Modernization of Vedic Astrology</strong></summary>

### KP 占星
### KP Astrology

- **創立者**：K.S. Krishnamurti（1908-1972）
- **時期**：1970 年代
- **核心**：Rasi/Star/Sub 三層主星系統
- **特色**：精確事件預測、Horary 問卜
- **Ayanamsa**：KP New Ayanamsa（23.848333°）

*Founder: K.S. Krishnamurti (1908-1972). Period: 1970s. Core: Rasi/Star/Sub three-tier lordship system. Feature: precise event prediction, Horary astrology. Ayanamsa: KP New Ayanamsa (23.848333°).*

### 納迪占星文獻
### Nadi Astrology Texts

- **來源**：南印度棕櫚葉手稿
- **傳說**：古代聖人預寫個人命運
- **現代發現**：1950 年代開始整理出版

*Source: South Indian palm-leaf manuscripts. Legend: ancient sages pre-wrote individual destinies. Modern discovery: catalogued and published from 1950s.*

### 電腦排盤普及
### Computer Chart Calculation

- **1980 年代**：個人電腦出現
- **Jagannatha Hora**：免費 Vedic 排盤軟體
- **瑞士星曆表**：高精度計算核心

*1980s: personal computers emerged. Jagannatha Hora: free Vedic chart software. Swiss Ephemeris: high-precision calculation core.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🌏 亞洲傳統占星 | Asian Traditional Astrology</strong></summary>

### 日本宿曜道
### Japanese Sukkayodo

- **傳入**：唐代從中國傳入日本
- **核心**：二十八宿 + 六曜
- **應用**：擇日、婚配、商業

*Introduction: Tang Dynasty from China to Japan. Core: 28 Mansions + Six Luminaries. Application: date selection, marriage matching, business.*

### 泰國占星
### Thai Astrology

- **基礎**：印度占星 + 本土信仰
- **特色**：九宮格占卜、泰式盤面
- **應用**：佛像開光、建築選址

*Foundation: Vedic astrology + local beliefs. Feature: nine-grid divination, Thai-style charts. Application: Buddha consecration, architectural siting.*

### 緬甸 Mahabote
### Myanmar Mahabote

- **核心**：八方位系統
- **七宮**：基於星期制的宮位系統
- **行星大運**：獨特週期系統

*Core: eight-direction system. Seven houses: weekday-based house system. Planetary periods: unique cycle system.*

### 巴厘 Wariga
### Balinese Wariga

- **Wuku 週期**：210 天循環
- **Wewaran**：1-10 日週期組合
- **Neptu**：數值吉凶計算
- **應用**：宗教儀式、婚禮、葬禮

*Wuku cycle: 210-day cycle. Wewaran: 1-10 day period combinations. Neptu: numerical auspiciousness calculation. Application: religious ceremonies, weddings, funerals.*

### 蒙古祖爾海
### Mongolian Zurkhai

- **來源**：藏傳佛教曆算
- **12 生肖**：與中國相同
- **五行**：木火土金水，各分陰陽
- **60 年循環**：生肖×元素

*Source: Tibetan Buddhist calendar calculation. 12 Animal signs: same as Chinese. Five Elements: wood, fire, earth, metal, water, each yin/yang. 60-year cycle: animals × elements.*

### 九星氣學
### Nine Star Ki

- **起源**：日本，基於中國風水
- **九宮**：洛書九宮格
- **本命星**：出生年對應星曜
- **應用**：方位學、相性分析

*Origins: Japan, based on Chinese feng shui. Nine Palaces: Lo Shu nine-grid. Life Star (本命星): birth year corresponding star. Application: directionology, compatibility analysis.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>🏺 古代體系復原 | Ancient System Restoration</strong></summary>

### 瑪雅占星
### Maya Astrology

- **Tzolkin**：260 天神聖曆
- **Haab**：365 天太陽曆
- **Long Count**：長計曆
- **現代研究**：José Argüelles 等

*Tzolkin: 260-day sacred calendar. Haab: 365-day solar calendar. Long Count: long-count calendar. Modern research: José Argüelles, etc.*

### 阿茲特克占星
### Aztec Astrology

- **Tonalpohualli**：260 天曆
- **Trecena**：13 天週期
- **守護神祇**：每日對應神靈
- **現代復興**：墨西哥文化復興運動

*Tonalpohualli: 260-day calendar. Trecena: 13-day cycle. Patron deities: daily corresponding spirits. Modern revival: Mexican cultural renaissance movement.*

### 巴比倫占星復原
### Babylonian Astrology Restoration

- **泥板研究**：大英博物館、柏林博物館藏品
- **現代學者**：Francesca Rochberg、Ulla Koch-Westenholz
- **復原技術**：原始黃道計算、預兆解讀

*Tablet research: British Museum, Berlin Museum collections. Modern scholars: Francesca Rochberg, Ulla Koch-Westenholz. Restored techniques: original zodiac calculation, omen interpretation.*

### 薩珊波斯占星
### Sassanian Persian Astrology

- **時期**：公元 224-651 年
- **特色**：菱形 12 宮星盤、Firdar 生命週期
- **影響**：伊斯蘭占星、中世紀歐洲
- **現代研究**：2010 年代開始復原

*Period: 224-651 CE. Features: diamond 12-house chart, Firdar life cycles. Influence: Islamic astrology, medieval Europe. Modern research: restoration began 2010s.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary><strong>💻 數位時代 | Digital Age</strong></summary>

### 瑞士星曆表
### Swiss Ephemeris

- **開發**：1980 年代，瑞士占星協會
- **精度**：±0.001 弧秒
- **應用**：Kin Astro 等現代排盤系統核心

*Development: 1980s, Swiss Astrological Society. Precision: ±0.001 arcseconds. Application: core calculation engine for modern chart systems like Kin Astro.*

### 電腦排盤軟體
### Computer Chart Software

- **1980 年代**：DOS 時代早期軟體
- **1990 年代**：Windows/Mac 圖形界面
- **2000 年代**：網路排盤、手機 App
- **2020 年代**：AI 整合、多體系平台

*1980s: early DOS software. 1990s: Windows/Mac GUI. 2000s: online charts, mobile apps. 2020s: AI integration, multi-system platforms.*

### Kin Astro 多體系平台
### Kin Astro Multi-System Platform

- **33 個占星體系**：涵蓋全球主要傳統
- **AI 智慧分析**：Cerebras AI 整合
- **開源免費**：MIT 授權
- **中英雙語**：全球化支援

*33 astrology systems: covering major global traditions. AI analysis: Cerebras AI integration. Open-source free: MIT License. Bilingual: Chinese and English support.*

</details>

---

## 六、占星體系分類總覽
## VI. Overview of Astrological System Classification

| 分類 Category | 體系 Systems | 起源時期 Origin | 黃道類型 Zodiac Type |
|---|---|---|---|
| 🏛️ 西方體系 Western | 西洋、希臘、卡巴拉、猶太、天王星、Astrocartography | 希臘化時期 Hellenistic | 回歸黃道 Tropical |
| 🪷 印度體系 Indian | Vedic、Jaimini、KP、Nadi | 吠陀時期 Vedic | 恆星黃道 Sidereal |
| 🏮 中國體系 Chinese | 七政四餘、紫微、三式、萬化仙禽、達摩一掌經 | 先秦漢唐 Pre-Qin to Tang | 赤道/黃道 Equatorial/Ecliptic |
| 🌏 亞洲體系 Asian | 宿曜道、泰國、緬甸、巴厘、藏傳、蒙古、九星氣 | 中世紀 Medieval | 混合 Mixed |
| 🕌 中東體系 Middle Eastern | 阿拉伯、也門、薩珊波斯 | 伊斯蘭黃金時代 Islamic Golden Age | 混合 Mixed |
| 🏺 古代文明 Ancient | 瑪雅、阿茲特克、古埃及、巴比倫 | 古代 Ancient | 各自獨立 Independent |

---

## 七、參考文獻
## VII. References

### 古代文獻 | Ancient Texts

1. **MUL.APIN**. British Museum. c. 1000 BCE.
2. **Ptolemy, C.** *Tetrabiblos*. Alexandria, c. 150 CE.
3. **Valens, V.** *Anthology*. Antioch, c. 170 CE.
4. **司馬遷 Sima Qian**. 《史記·天官書》Records of the Grand Historian: Treatise on the Celestial Offices. c. 100 BCE.
5. **《Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra》**. India, c. 400-700 CE.
6. **《Jaimini Sutras》**. India, c. 200 BCE-200 CE.

### 中世紀文獻 | Medieval Texts

7. **Al-Kindi**. *On the Stellar Rays*. Baghdad, 9th century.
8. **Albumasar**. *Introduction to Astrology*. Baghdad, 9th century.
9. **《Picatrix》** (Ghayat al-Hakim). Spain, c. 1000 CE.
10. **Rasulid Hexaglot**. Yemen, 13th century.
11. **張果 Zhang Guo**. 《張果星宗》Zhang Guo Xing Zong. Tang Dynasty.
12. **Lilly, W.** *Christian Astrology*. London, 1647.

### 現代研究 | Modern Research

13. **Rochberg, F.** *The Heavenly Writing: Divination, Horoscopy, and Astronomy in Mesopotamian Culture*. Cambridge University Press, 2004.
14. **Greenbaum, D.G.** *The Daimon in Hellenistic Astrology*. Mohr Siebeck, 2016.
15. **Pingree, D.** *Yavanajātaka of Sphujidhvaja*. Harvard University Press, 1978.
16. **Jones, M.E.** *The Sabian Symbols in Astrology*. Shambhala, 1953.
17. **Krishnamurti, K.S.** *KP Reader Vol. I-IV*. Mumbai, 1970s-1990s.
18. **Needham, J.** *Science and Civilisation in China, Vol. 3: Mathematics and the Sciences of the Heavens and the Earth*. Cambridge University Press, 1959.
19. **Koch-Westenholz, U.** *Mesopotamian Astrology: An Introduction to Babylonian and Assyrian Celestial Divination*. Museum Tusculanum Press, 1995.
20. **Greene, L.** *Saturn: A New Look at an Old Devil*. Samuel Weiser, 1976.

### 網路資源 | Online Resources

21. **Wikipedia**. "Astrology". https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Astrology
22. **Wikipedia**. "占星術". https://zh.wikipedia.org/zh-tw/%E5%8D%A0%E6%98%9F%E6%9C%AF
23. **Project Hindsight**. https://www.astrology.com.tw
24. **Swiss Ephemeris**. https://www.astro.com/swisseph/
25. **Internet Archive**. Astrology texts. https://archive.org
